projectDescription: A multi-tenant warehouse management and logistics platform for freight forwarders and courier companies, offering package tracking, prealert intake, flight manifests, and automated billing.
keyFeatures: Prealert submission API for courier partners (API key auth)
Automated customer list sync from courier systems via configurable endpoint
CSV bulk customer upload with upsert logic
Package intake and warehouse scanning with prealert pre-fill
Flight manifest creation with AWB auto-detection and courier breakdown
Tiered weight-based billing engine with air freight rates and invoice generation
Webhook payload designer for custom courier API mapping
Role-based access control (admin, manager, warehouse, courier)
Real-time background worker with Redis queue for package and manifest sync
Public tracking portal for end-customer shipment visibility
Invoice Ninja and Stripe billing integrations
publicApiSurface: POST /api/Prealert.php — Submit a prealert (API key auth, public courier endpoint)
GET/POST /api/SyncCustomer.php — Trigger or check customer sync (JWT auth)
POST /api/UploadCustomers.php — Bulk CSV customer import (JWT auth)
GET /api/Customers.php — List customers with pagination (JWT auth)
GET /api/SearchCustomers.php — Basic and fuzzy customer search (JWT auth)
GET /api/GetManifest.php — Get manifest details and packages (JWT auth)
POST /api/ManageManifest.php — Update manifest status, add/remove packages (JWT auth)
GET/POST /api/CourierSettingsAPI.php — Manage courier profile and API keys (JWT auth)
GET/POST/PUT /api/GetCourierRates.php — Manage rate tiers and air freight (JWT auth)
POST /api/login.php — Authenticate and receive JWT token (public)
